title: Sales Manager / Sales Director (B2B AI Software)
description:
About Alphatok Alphatok is a Singapore-based B2B AI technology company focused on delivering practical, enterprise-grade AI solutions. We help enterprises and government organizations adopt AI through: AI-driven business systems (CRM, ERP, intelligent workflow platforms) AI Agents, RAG, and private LLM deployments Custom enterprise software development and long-term technical support

Job Summary

You will lead the full sales cycle to drive commercial growth for Alphatok’s B2B AI business. This role involves shaping go-to-market strategies, managing complex enterprise sales, and delivering AI-driven transformation solutions to diverse clients.

Responsibilities

Business Development & Sales

  • Identify, develop, and close B2B sales opportunities with enterprises, government bodies, and mid-to-large organizations to drive revenue growth
  • Sell AI software solutions, customized systems, and long-term service contracts by aligning offerings with client needs
  • Translate customer business challenges into tailored, commercial AI solutions that address strategic objectives

Client & Solution Engagement

  • Collaborate with technical teams to design and present AI-driven solutions that meet client requirements
  • Lead client meetings, deliver solution presentations, prepare proposals, and negotiate contracts to secure deals
  • Build and maintain long-term client relationships to drive contract renewals, upselling, and cross-selling opportunities

Sales Strategy & Team Building

  • Contribute to the development of sales strategies, pricing models, and sales process improvements to enhance effectiveness
  • Support the design and optimization of CRM and sales management workflows to improve sales operations
  • Mentor junior sales or pre-sales team members, fostering their professional growth and enhancing team capabilities

Required competencies and certifications

  • 3+ years of B2B sales experience in software, IT services, SaaS, or digital transformation
  • Proven ability to manage enterprise-level deals with long sales cycles independently
  • Strong capability to sell complex, solution-based offerings
  • Demonstrated interest in AI, software, and emerging technologies

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Background in AI, SaaS, system integration, or consulting firms
  • Experience in the Singapore or Southeast Asia market
  • Exposure to government, large enterprise, or regulated-industry clients
  • Strong English communication skills

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
